General.Name: Greenland Hong Kong Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Greenland Hong Kong Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, engages development for sale and rental of properties, and related services in the People's Republic of China. It operates in four segments: Sales of Properties; Lease of Properties; Hotel and Related Services; and Property Management and Other Services. The company develops and sells residential properties; leases commercial and residential properties; operates hotels and service apartments; and provides property management and other services. It is also involved in hotel development; and provision of construction and decoration, commercial management, construction management, financing, software development, nutrition and health counseling, business investment, management, information transmission, software and information technology, management consulting, marketing, human resources, and advertising services. The company was formerly known as SPG Land (Holdings) Limited and changed its name to Greenland Hong Kong Holdings Limited in August 2013. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong. Greenland Hong Kong Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Gluon Xima International Limited.
